subtask1.query: Please read the query.md file in the workspace directory to understand the task requirements, and refer to context/operation_list.md for operational guidance. After completing the task, save all deliverables in the current directory.
deliverables: Data consistency design document (e.g., consistency_design.md or analysis_report.md)
Architecture design and flowchart description (may be merged into the design document)
Implementation examples or pseudocode for key components (may be merged into the document or as separate .py files)
Performance impact assessment (may be merged into the design document)
